    R

    readLineOffsetTrack() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Reads the offset from the line for tracking purposes.
    readLineStatus() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Reads the status of the line-following sensor.
    readUltrasonic() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Reads the distance from the ultrasonic sensor.
    receive() - Method in interface edu.desu.cis.robot.service.RobotService
    Receives a response message from the robot.
    receive() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TcpRobotService
    Receives a message from the connected robot.
    register(Class<T>, T) - Static method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.core.services.ServiceLocator
    Registers a service with the service locator.
    registerTelemetry(int, SensorCache) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Registers a telemetry listener for the robot.
    RobotCommandException - Exception Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.commands
    An exception thrown when an error occurs during the execution of a robot command.
    RobotCommandException(String) - Constructor for exception class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.RobotCommandException
    Constructs a new RobotCommandException with the specified detail message.
    RobotCommandException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.RobotCommandException
    Constructs a new RobotCommandException with the specified detail message and cause.
    RobotController - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.control
    An abstract controller for a robot, providing core functionalities for discovery, connection, and teardown.
    RobotController(String) - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.control.RobotController
    Constructs a new RobotController.
    RobotDiscovery - Interface in edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery
    An interface for discovering robots on the network.
    robotId() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery.DiscoveredRobot
    Returns the value of the robotId record component.
    RobotService - Interface in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
    An interface defining the contract for communicating with a robot.
    RobotServiceException - Exception Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
    An exception thrown when an error occurs within the robot service layer.
    RobotServiceException(String) - Constructor for exception class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.RobotServiceException
    Constructs a new RobotServiceException with the specified detail message.
    RobotServiceException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.RobotServiceException
    Constructs a new RobotServiceException with the specified detail message and cause.
    run() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.control.MazeRobot
     
    run() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.control.RobotController
    The main logic loop for the robot's behavior.
    run() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TelemetryListener
    The main loop for the listener thread.
